creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
emulates a Commodore 64

Fix: the following archive create a directory frodo-4.1
	this can be installed in the directory "/usr/ports/emulators".
	ftp://ftp.dinoex.sub.de/pub/appoved/ports-frodo-4.1.tar.gz
	also included in this mail
How-To-Repeat: 
	if the $PREFIX is changed, somee scripts won't work
	also fixes report ports/5210
